title: Limitless TPS
description: Removes the 20 TPS limit from Minecraft.
body:
This plugin removes the TPS limit from Minecraft. It's as simple as that. **IMPORTANT NOTE: Commands such as `/tps` will not show the real TPS. This is due to the command not supporting numbers above 20. If you want to see the true TPS, consider using [spark](https://spark.lucko.me/download) and using the profiler. The profiler report will show the true TPS.** I don't really have much to say about this plugin, but here are some testimonies: > *"This is the most appropriate use of the Cursed tag that I've seen to date."*
> \- Emmaffle Modrinth > *"The 20 TPS limit is an archaic ruin of the Dark Ages of Minecraft, when the corporations wanted to ensure that no one could ever have all of the TPS. This plugin is perfect for the modern world, when TPS should be unlimited and available to all Minecrafters!"*
> \- Shadow (not the gradle plugin) (yet) > *"One of the most essential plugins you must have in your Minecraft server. I personally have added it to every one of my servers, and I can say with absolute certainty that it single-handedly caused the downfall of every single one of them."*
> \- Bobert Grob, CEO of Fabricated Testimonies > *"What are you doing in my house? What? I don't even know what Minecraft is! Please leave, I'm begging you, I have a wife and three kids. Wait, what are you doing? No! Sto-"*
> \- Anonymous ## Frequently Asked Questions ### Q: Why would anyone want this? A: The question has been left as an exercise to the reader. ### Q: Is this plugin compatible with x? A: I don't know. Try it and see! (Probably not) ### Q: How much TPS can I get with this plugin? A: Depends on your hardware and startup flags. Personally, I've been able to get 4k TPS with this plugin. ### Q: Should I add this plugin to my production server? A: Only if your favourite pastime hobbies are "restoring backups" and "fixing world corruption"
